project: yeah but what if you could go upside down instead 2
yeah but what if you could go upside down instead
use the up and down arrow keys to change gravity.

the number in the background is the number of gravity switches you have left.

you don't have to use all of them.
you can use the left and right arrow keys to change gravity to either direction.
you can also press r to restart the level at any time.
how are you supposed to do this one??
the coloured arrow blocks change your gravity without deducting a gravity switch.
the gradient blocks change the number of gravity switches you have left.
the coins unlock parts of the level that you otherwise wouldn't have access to
the camera will scroll in the direction you move
